items.caption: A circular logo with a red border and a white background. the logo contains the word "movimento" in bold, black capital letters, with a red "v" above the "m". below the word "movimento," there are five yellow stars aligned horizontally. beneath the stars, the text "movimento5stelle.ita" is written in black capital letters. the style of the image is graphic and appears to be a political campaign logo, possibly for the 2018 italian elections.
